mapper.select: select job_id as jobId, job_title as jobTitle, recipient_group as recipientGroup, email_subject as emailSubject, smtp_server_name as smtpServerName, total_count as totalCount, pending_count as pendingCount, success_count as successCount, fail_count as failCount, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from osg_mailjob order by create_time desc, job_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into osg_mailjob ( job_title, recipient_group, email_subject, email_content, smtp_server_name, total_count, pending_count, success_count, fail_count, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{jobTitle}, #{recipientGroup}, #{emailSubject}, #{emailContent}, #{smtpServerName}, #{totalCount}, #{pendingCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{createTime}, now() )
